description.initial: You navigate through the northwestern dunes, where the sand takes on a reddish hue from iron deposits. The dunes here are taller, more imposing, their crests razor-sharp against the sky. A constant wind keeps the sand in motion, creating an ever-changing landscape.
description.return: The northwestern dunes. Red sand shifts eternally in the wind.
description.atmospheric: Fine sand stings your eyes. The red color makes the landscape feel alien, otherworldly.

west.blockedMessage: The desert extends endlessly westward. There is nothing for you there.

interactables.name: Iron Outcrop
interactables.examineText: A dark iron rock protrudes from the sand, the source of the reddish color in this region. It's warm to the touch from the sun's heat.
